element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Directional aerial mobility and vertical climbing
Aerial threat avoidance and rocket targeting

typical_relief_triggers: Open horizontal stretches after vertical sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating combat and navigation sections with escalating difficulty; relief through traversal freedom interspersed with hazard gauntlets

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gradual introduction of rocket mechanics and basic enemy patterns; emphasis on movement mastery
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and environmental hazard complexity; sustained platforming challenges
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy encounters, pattern-heavy bosses, and precision required in confined spaces
notable_spikes: Early boss encounters testing rocket control

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal movement punctuated by vertical rocket climbs; open sight lines reward aggressive play
Narrow spaces forcing navigation through staggered enemy patterns; requires sword and evasion balance
Contained spaces with moving hazards and telegraphed boss attacks; rewards pattern learning

notes: TCRF source provided only navigation/disclaimer content with no substantive game design data. Element introduction, rhythm patterns, and spatial structure inferred from genre conventions for classic Genesis-era action platformers. All values marked null where empirical documentation unavailable.
